raw_text: I used to order a lot from this app but suddenly I started receiving rotten and spoiled items and hence stopped using this app and switched back to my local kirana shop and vegetable vendor.....the experience was pathetic and it couldn't be more worst also the query section doesn't work they ask us to email our query which is again very hectic.

Blinkit is completely useless in Borda Margao. For over a week it shows “currently unavailable” all day and night. What’s the point of listing great prices if you can’t order anything? It’s misleading and a waste of time. Every time I open the app it’s the same nonsense. No proper way to complain either, just limited options and even a character limit. At this point the app is as good as uninstalling. Fix your service or stop pretending to operate here. edit: again it's unavailable!!

Totally bad experience actually i did order by mistake in wrong address and i was already paid before delivery and after i saw then i want to change or cancel order but this was not available and i try to contact blinkit support but don't come responsible msg in there side and this is totally baad experience and now i did delete and never use this app and also i will say many people and friends about this experience and i will also say that this blinkit support is totally worst.

I could notice blinkit app receiving mandatory handling charges other than deliver charges, but the bags which contains items are always torn. and delivery person always tells us that its coz of heavy items. dear blinkit. kindly look into this matter. I have faced this issue many a times.

Blink It is a really great app. I have been using Blink It for almost a year now. I have tried many other apps but Blink It's service is really great. It is a time to time service. And I have a lot of confidence in it. The only problem I have with it is that the minimum order should not be up to ₹200. I wish it should be at least up to 100 rupees. Otherwise, this app is really helpful.

worst app can't you even show products even the location is unavailable like Amazon or meesho I really got frustrated just after downloading it I tried more than 5 location over 3 district but it didn't work don't download the app and waste your time just install Amazon or meesho

When I was in Mumbai, I used the Blinkit app, and it was excellent—the service there was great. However, I have now moved to Bihar. I placed an order some time ago; it has already been 24 minutes, yet I still haven't received it. The delivery time has been stuck on "12 minutes" for quite a while now. I am really disappointed with the Blinkit app.... 😑😑😑

It shows after payment has been cut that payment has not been received, this has happened to me 4 to 5 times, it is not even stolen, every time the payment is above Rs 500, like Rs 900 or Rs 800, it does this thing, that is why it is bad app but if you use it then take cash on delivery, do not make online payment like me

"Blinkit" is the worst app ever. I ordered a talc powder and chose online payment, but the delivery person refused, saying the scanner was not working and asked for cash instead. I did not have cash. This keeps happening — delivery agents do not carry change and expect customers to adjust. He told me to cancel the order, and after cancelling, Blinkit charged me a cancellation fee even though the mistake was from your side. Very poor service.

service is good efficient and prompt. But problem is to return or replace items if goods are found not in order or damaged. This issue must be seen. Normally everything is good but if once a time it happens then what to do.

Delievery service of the app is not good, there is much fraud in delievery, i waited for more than 1 hour for my delievery and the delievery boy & app claimed that they delievered the order but i had not recieved it. after talking to them they helped me out and scheduled re-delievery for my order. Happy with their customer care service but unsatisfied with their delievery service.

Very disappointed with Blinkit. I ordered a brown coffee mug but received a green one instead. I reported the issue within 1 hour of delivery, and the mug was neither used nor disposed of. Despite this, my replacement request was rejected with a false reason stating that the item had been used or disposed of. This is poor customer service and an unfair resolution. I expected Blinkit to take responsibility for delivering the wrong product. I hope the company improves its support and treats custom

I am deleting this freaking app for my own good i accidentally made order twice one where I had paid on door step and one where I have already paid through online. here cancelling of order is very annoying like it's not even convenient to cancel the order like what the heck . I mean I had to call the delivery partner and cancel it. i selected promo code by mistake and it don't even have reconfirmation and now I can't change it cash

It is my first order from blinkit. I am sharing my experience while rating the app. The delivery guy Suryakan is very humble. I have ordered the products with COD option as my account has a minimum balance. The total was 869 rupees. I kept the exact amount to handover. However, I didn't realise that it was less of a five rupees coin which I dropped at home by mistake. I asked him if I had paid him the correct amount, and he said yes. After an hou, I saw the 5 rupees coin was kept on the table.

all time delivery is good but sometimes it may get delay or something else issue and most important thing when it's come near to customer in app in map the route line doesn't see please make sure of live location route will see till delivered

the customer support is only option oriented. if someone has to report another problem which is not listed anywhere about any glitch in the app or account. they have no where to report. very bad customer support. atleast they should have given option to customers to report their problem somewhere.

I am giving 1 star if there is an option to give 0 stars I will give that I ordered symphony air cooler, in that package wheels was missing I requested the delivery agent for replacement he suggested to submit replacement request in the app that option was not showing, before ordering it was showing 7 days replacement. we have sent an email but in return we got a response that they are not responsible for that they sent a sealed package but I have already submitted an open box video and photos.

My ice cream had already melted because the delivery was extremely late. The most disappointing part is that the delivery boy marked the order as “arrived” 17 minutes earlier, but actually delivered it after 26 minutes. This is not a good habit or service at all. This has happened to me twice now. Last time, it got delayed by 40 minutes and the order was eventually cancelled. Really disappointed with this experience.

I hate blinkit customer service..other apps like flipkart cart and zepto's customer care is great ....i was supposed to get my refund by 14th but I didn't so thought of bringing it up but the ai bot kept giving me the same answer over n over again so i thought I would try to get past that buy complaining about another product that I bought but even when I was assigned a agent they choose to complety ignore me and I didn't even get a chance to put my side of the story absolutely disgusting!!

Every time I order something from blinkit one or the other item is missing and nobody cares to inform you Earlier never faced this kind of issue but from the past 2 months it's been happening again & again...Very disappointed
